ecs_cluster_id.description: ID of the existing ECS cluster to deploy services into

subnet_ids.description: List of subnet IDs for ECS service networking (awsvpc)

security_group_ids.description: List of security group IDs for ECS service networking (awsvpc)

vpc_id.description: VPC ID for the private DNS namespace

config_bucket.description: S3 bucket name for storing config files

task_role_arn.description: IAM role ARN for ECS tasks

task_execution_role_arn.description: IAM role ARN for ECS task execution (pull images, write logs)

capacity_provider.description: Name of the ECS capacity provider
